title: helichrysum tillandsiifolium
intro: Helichrysum tillandsiifolium, also known as the Yellow Everlasting or Tillandsia-leaved Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum tillandsiifolium include relief from pain and inflammation, improved digestion, and reduced stress levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
